full_text:
Xu Fang (Gongmou) 徐訪 (公謀)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xu Fang (徐訪), styledGongmou (公謀), was born in Gaoping commandery. General who Garrisons the North. Had famous descendants. Xu Fang may not have existed in history. Xu Fang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
